kata — keybindings

Global                        Detail                                     Forms                       
?         help                tab            next tab                    ctrl+s         save or apply
q/ctrl+c  quit                shift+tab      prev tab                    esc            cancel       
P         projects            enter          jump to referenced issue    tab/shift+tab  change field 
D         daemons             esc/backspace  back                        ctrl+e         open editor  
L         toggle layout       e              edit body                   ctrl+u         clear prompt 
                              c              new comment                                             
Graph                         p              set parent                  Filters                     
k       up                    b              add blocker                 /       search              
j       down                  l              add related                 s       cycle status filter 
up      scroll up             +              add label                   f       filter (form)       
down    scroll down           -              remove label                c       clear filters       
pgup    page up               a              assign owner                ctrl+r  reset filter form   
pgdown  page down             A              clear owner                                             
g       first                 !              set priority                                            
G       last                                                                                         
enter   open detail           Children                                                               
space   expand/collapse       N      new child                                                       
right   expand                j/k    move child cursor                                               
left    collapse              ↑↓     scroll detail viewport                                          
n       new issue (form)      enter  open child                                                      
o       toggle graph order                                                                           
x       close                                                                                        
r       reopen                                                                                       

press ? to return
